blended.narrative: Mount Sunapee is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,535 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
